context.user_question: Why do you recommend this maintenance plan?
rules: Answer only using the provided analysis data.
Do not invent causes, values, timestamps, actions, or forecasts.
Every technical claim must be supported by evidence from the analysis.
If the analysis is insufficient, say that the available data is insufficient.
Do not override the selected action plan. You may explain it, not replace it.

decisions.diagnosis_description: Nozzle plate shows signs of clogging

selected_plan.expected_effect: Apply RUN_CLEANING_CYCLE + SCHEDULE_MAINTENANCE. This reduces clogging and recovers printhead efficiency. Projected status becomes FUNCTIONAL with health index 0.780

top_alternatives.expected_effect: Apply RUN_CLEANING_CYCLE + SCHEDULE_MAINTENANCE. This reduces clogging and recovers printhead efficiency. Projected status becomes FUNCTIONAL with health index 0.780
Apply SCHEDULE_MAINTENANCE. This reduces clogging and recovers printhead efficiency. Projected status becomes DEGRADED with health index 0.653
Apply RUN_CLEANING_CYCLE. This reduces clogging and recovers printhead efficiency. Projected status becomes DEGRADED with health index 0.591
No intervention applied. Projected status remains DEGRADED with health index 0.453
Apply RUN_CLEANING_CYCLE + REDUCE_LOAD. This reduces clogging and recovers printhead efficiency. Projected status becomes DEGRADED with health index 0.598

decisions.diagnosis_description: Heating elements are degrading under sustained temperature stress

selected_plan.expected_effect: Apply TRIGGER_COOLDOWN + REDUCE_LOAD + SCHEDULE_MAINTENANCE. This reduces thermal stress and slows heat-driven degradation. Projected status becomes FUNCTIONAL with health index 0.728

top_alternatives.expected_effect: Apply TRIGGER_COOLDOWN + REDUCE_LOAD + SCHEDULE_MAINTENANCE. This reduces thermal stress and slows heat-driven degradation. Projected status becomes FUNCTIONAL with health index 0.728
No intervention applied. Projected status remains DEGRADED with health index 0.458
Apply TRIGGER_COOLDOWN. This reduces thermal stress and slows heat-driven degradation. Projected status becomes DEGRADED with health index 0.539
Apply REDUCE_LOAD. This reduces thermal stress and slows heat-driven degradation. Projected status becomes DEGRADED with health index 0.473
Apply TRIGGER_COOLDOWN + REDUCE_LOAD. This reduces thermal stress and slows heat-driven degradation. Projected status becomes DEGRADED with health index 0.544

decisions.diagnosis_description: Recoater blade wear may increase powder contamination

selected_plan.expected_effect: Apply SCHEDULE_MAINTENANCE. This reduces wear propagation and downstream contamination risk. Projected status becomes FUNCTIONAL with health index 0.834

top_alternatives.expected_effect: Apply SCHEDULE_MAINTENANCE. This reduces wear propagation and downstream contamination risk. Projected status becomes FUNCTIONAL with health index 0.834
Apply REDUCE_LOAD + SCHEDULE_MAINTENANCE. This reduces wear propagation and downstream contamination risk. Projected status becomes FUNCTIONAL with health index 0.838
No intervention applied. Projected status remains DEGRADED with health index 0.641
Apply REDUCE_LOAD. This reduces wear propagation and downstream contamination risk. Projected status becomes DEGRADED with health index 0.651
Apply REPLACE_COMPONENT. This restores component condition at higher operational cost. Projected status becomes FUNCTIONAL with health index 1.000
